tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold
tasks.description:
Cargo.toml with deps (clap/serde/serde_json/chrono+serde/rayon/comfy-table/fuzzy-matcher/dirs/anyhow; dev assert_cmd/predicates/tempfile), minimal main.rs, rustfmt.toml.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml", "src/main.rs", "rustfmt.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build succeeds"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Discovery and path matching
tasks.description:
src/discovery.rs: projects_root, resolve_target, normalize, encode_path, dir_matches (loose), path_under (strict). Unit tests incl. dashed sibling.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/discovery.rs", "src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test discovery", "acceptanceCriteria": ["encode_path", "dir_matches", "path_under excludes dashed sibling"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Session parsing
tasks.description:
src/session.rs: Session struct + parse_session (name via summary/first prompt, cwd, timestamps, branch, count). Unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/session.rs", "src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test session", "acceptanceCriteria": ["name+cwd", "summary precedence", "skip garbage"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Filtering, fuzzy search, sorting
tasks.description:
src/filter.rs: SortKey, parse_when, period_bounds, time_filter, search (SkimMatcherV2), sort_sessions. Unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/filter.rs", "src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test filter", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse_when", "period_bounds", "fuzzy search", "sort+reverse"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Output rendering (table + JSON)
tasks.description:
src/output.rs: render_json, render_table (comfy-table), truncate, relative_time. Unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/output.rs", "src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test output", "acceptanceCriteria": ["json array", "table footer", "helpers"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CLI and orchestration + integration tests
tasks.description:
src/cli.rs Cli struct; main.rs run() full pipeline; tests/cli.rs (assert_cmd) incl. dashed-sibling exclusion + exit code 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/cli.rs", "src/main.rs", "tests/cli.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table", "json", "dashed sibling excluded", "exit 2"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Distribution — docs, license, changelog, CI/release
tasks.description:
README.md, SKILL.md, LICENSE (MIT), CHANGELOG.md, install.sh, .github/workflows/ci.yml + release.yml.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "SKILL.md", "LICENSE", "CHANGELOG.md", "install.sh", ".github/workflows/ci.yml", ".github/workflows/release.yml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --release && ls .github/workflows", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README", "SKILL frontmatter", "CI+release", "MIT+changelog"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: First release (manual, requires user)
tasks.description:
Publish under sibincbaby (HTTPS) and tag v0.1.0. Run only on explicit user go-ahead.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh release view v0.1.0", "acceptanceCriteria": ["repo pushed", "v0.1.0 tagged", "release tarballs"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
